title: Fable 5 Returns... This Is Big
summary: A YouTube video discussing leaked evidence that Anthropic's Fable 5 model may be returning after being pulled for national security reasons. The video points to Claude Code leaks, Amazon Bedrock confirmations, Congressional demands for transparency, and reports of a stronger successor model as signals that the situation may be shifting.
writeup: The video examines leaked signals that Anthropic's Fable 5 model, previously pulled over national security concerns, may be coming back. The evidence cited includes references in Claude Code leaks, confirmations on Amazon Bedrock, Congressional demands for transparency, and reports of a stronger successor model. The takeaway is that these scattered signals point to a possible shift in the model's status, with national security framing central to why it was withheld in the first place.
